name: Vir Biotechnology, Inc.
summary: . Overview and Strategy Powering the Immune System to Transform Lives. Vir Biotechnology, Inc. (including its subsidiaries, referred to as Vir Bio, the Company, we, our or us) is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on powering the immune system to transform lives by discovering and developing medicines for serious infectious diseases and cancer.
